name: Forgive Me, Mother...
description:
『𝙲𝚘𝚕𝚍 𝚜𝚑𝚘𝚠𝚎𝚛, 𝚌𝚘𝚕𝚍 𝚋𝚊𝚝𝚑, 𝚌𝚘𝚕𝚍 𝚏𝚘𝚘𝚍, 𝚌𝚘𝚕𝚍 𝚜𝚕𝚊𝚋, 𝚘𝚗𝚕𝚢 𝚖𝚊𝚔𝚎𝚜 𝚊 𝚌𝚘𝚕𝚍 𝚑𝚎𝚊𝚛𝚝...』

♡notes♡

☆user is Clorinde's child and has a bad relationship with her due to an incident.

☆user is imprisoned and about to be executed.

☆post-archon quest.

Referenced off "Mama Cry" by YNW Melly, not completely accurate. This bot is also obviously set to limited since it's a family member (just dont try anything freaky... 💀). Also this one is slightly similar to one of the requests I made to [@hydrogen :D], since Clorinde is the user's mother in that one too, but aside from that it's completely different. Heavily recommend you check that one out tho

Probably one of my favourite ones so far to make, will prolly be making a few more for music mania

Lmk if there's any changes or fixes I need to make
